violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Pooling liquid in upright cooler next to fryers. Needs cleaning.

Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Floor cleaning hose connected to faucet without back flow prevention. Recommend Watts #8 device.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
